summary: Tested AI recipe macro estimation (POST /api/ai/recipe-macros + Recipes.jsx Estimate macros button). Backend pytest suite: 2/2 passing with real Claude integration. Found and fixed a P0 frontend bug: `Calculator` lucide-react icon was used at Recipes.jsx L363 but not imported — broke entire /recipes route with `ReferenceError: Calculator is not defined`. After adding the import, end-to-end flow validated: negative case (toast + no API call), positive case (API returns correct JSON, all 5 numeric fields pre-filled, 'Macros estimated' toast shown).

issues: Console warning: empty string passed to attribute — pre-existing, non-blocking.

action_items: Done by testing agent: added `Calculator` to the lucide-react import in Recipes.jsx (one-line import fix to unblock the page). No further action required for the macro-estimation feature.
critical_code_review_comments: Recipes.jsx: the `Calculator` icon was used without being imported — classic missing-import that slipped past lint (ESLint may need react/jsx-no-undef enabled or no-undef to catch this). Recommend adding eslint rule or a pre-commit check.

ai_endpoints.py ai_recipe_macros: regex `\{[^{}]*\}` is fragile — fails if Claude emits nested JSON. Current prompt forbids nesting, so OK, but consider `json.loads(text)` first with regex as fallback.

Numeric input placeholders ('kcal','P(g)','C(g)','F(g)','Prep (min)') are used as selectors — prefer dedicated data-testid attrs on each numeric input for test stability (e.g. `data-testid="new-recipe-calories"`).
estimateMacros catches all errors silently into a generic toast — consider logging the error for diagnostics.
seed_data_creation: Typed a 'TEST Grilled Chicken Bowl' recipe into the Add dialog for the estimate test but did NOT click Save, so nothing persisted to DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature is green. Only cosmetic cleanups remain: add dedicated data-testid to numeric macro inputs, and silence the stale warning. Backend returned {prep_time:25, calories:312, protein:38, carbs:12, fat:12} for the test payload — matches spec. Regression on /, /companion, /sunday passes.
rca of the issue: Root cause: Recipes.jsx introduced `<Calculator size={14}...>` inside the estimate button JSX but the icon was never added to the `lucide-react` import list. In React dev mode this threw `ReferenceError: Calculator is not defined` at render, blanking the entire /recipes page. Reproduction: navigate to /recipes → blank white screen with react-error-overlay. Fix applied: added `Calculator` to the `lucide-react` import line. Verified: page renders, Add Recipe dialog opens, Estimate macros button works end-to-end with real Claude call.
